_schema.title: headline
_schema.type: feat | docs | decision | fix | infra | content

entries.title: Bonfire knowledge graph 20 kEngrams seeded (rounds 5+6+7, 20 parallel subagents)
entries.description: Three batches of parallel subagents added six new kEngrams: music-rights-pipeline (BMI -> MLC -> DistroKid -> 0xSplits chain + post-UMG CD Baby exit), tip-zols-architecture (three-token reconciliation: $TIP not yet deployed, ZOLs off-chain, $ZABAL only freely-tradable layer), tool-stack-deep-dive (32 tools across music/agent/ops/crypto categories with cost+auth+integration each), calendar-automation (Lu.ma + Cal.com end-to-end ZABAL Games workshop flow), talent-vs-quotient (recommendation: Quotient for Empire booster + Respect for governance + Talent Protocol optional external visibility), songjam-x-empire (X scraper retired due to paid API, SANG token mechanics + 250k stake minimum). Graph total now 401 entities + 593 edges (was 254 + 322). All 8 queued topics now done in ZAOcowork research-dispatch queue.

entries.title: Live signup counter + /winners + /mentor template + 16 adoptable projects total
entries.description: Hero now carries a LIVE ticker (workshop leads count / claimed projects / mentor slots / countdown to June 1). /winners page placeholder for Season 1 Finals results (fills in August). /mentor.html?handle=X dynamic profile page reads /data/mentors.json. Adoptable projects grew from 9 to 16 (added 7 starter-repo adoptions from bettercallzaal repo audit, ids 10-16, with visual STARTER REPO badge).

entries.title: ZABAL Bonfire knowledge graph live (171 entities, 220 edges, 12 kEngrams)
entries.description: data/bonfire-graph.json now seeds the live Bonfire knowledge graph at zabal.bonfires.ai across 12 dimensions (Hermes architecture, WaveWarZ v1+v2, ZABAL Empire, Farcaster Snap 2026, POIDH bounty rails, Bonfire push pattern, Coinflow ISV, ZAOstock sponsor mechanics, Quotient booster, FISHBOWLZ-to-Juke transition, Bonfire revenue model, ZOE Telegram skills). llms.txt has the queryable-depth pointer section. Agents loading this prompt can now query the graph for any kEngram and traverse 1-2 hops for depth that does not bloat the prompt.

entries.title: research-dispatch pipeline shipped to ZAODEVZ/ZAOcowork
entries.description: VPS-side autonomous research orchestrator now lives at ZAODEVZ/ZAOcowork/research-dispatch (sibling of agent/ which is ZAOcoworkingBot). Fans out parallel Claude Code subagents on research topics, normalizes findings into Bonfire entities/edges, pushes to live Bonfire, commits the graph back to zabalgames. Triggered by Telegram /research command or weekly Sunday cron. 8 topics queued (32 dimensions).

entries.title: Hero stats go live + /context + /finals/live scaffold
entries.description: Homepage stat cards now read from /data/workshop-leads.json + /data/adoptable-projects.json - automatic updates as JSON files change. /context renders llms.txt in browser with per-section copy buttons. /finals/live is the project #09 starting scaffold with 5 DATA/UI TODO cards.

entries.title: /about page - the team behind ZABAL Games
entries.description: Public team page: Hosts (Zaal, The ZAO), Core Builders (Hurric4n3Ike, Sam, Arthur, Iman), Confirmed Workshop Leads (Tyler), Partner Platforms (Magnetiq, Empire Builder, Zlank, SongJam, WaveWarZ, Clanker, Neynar/Hats/Bonfire/EAS), Mentors, Open Invitations.

entries.title: Adoptable projects now data-driven across pages
entries.description: Both /projects.html and index.html #projects section now render from /data/adoptable-projects.json. Adding a new project = one JSON edit, two pages update.

entries.title: WaveWarZ-Base as the August Finals voting protocol
entries.description: Architectural decision: the August Finals placement is decided by the WaveWarZ-Base prediction-market protocol. Each finalist build = a battle entry. Wallets trade on which wins. Smart contract settles at T+72h. Respect-holders get pre-funded baseline positions. Replaces the original Respect 1p1v vote. Full design in Doc 720.

entries.title: Code snippets + anti-patterns + quality bar added to llms.txt
entries.description: llms.txt grew from 18KB to 28KB with three new sections: 'Don't build these' (8 anti-patterns), 'Code snippets - the rails' (TypeScript samples for Neynar, Empire Builder, Hats, EAS, Clanker, Coinflow, Hypersub, Bonfire, Farcaster cast composer), and 'What good looks like' (concrete quality bar).

entries.title: /research page + adoptable-projects JSON data file
entries.description: Browsable index of the 9 research docs with curated reading order per role (builder / mentor / future organizer). Adoptable projects also now in a JSON data file ready for dynamic render.

entries.title: Zlank template PR for the in-cast 4-button Snap
entries.description: Opened PR #63 on bettercallzaal/zlank adding a 'ZABAL Games signup' partner template. Once merged + published via zlank.online, the resulting /s/[uuid] URL renders as a real in-cast Farcaster Snap. Workaround for Farcaster's caster not probing arbitrary URLs with snap+json Accept.

entries.title: /lead + /projects standalone pages
entries.description: Two dedicated landing pages, sharable URLs for DM-driven traffic. /lead = workshop-lead recruitment with form + Cal.com slot placeholder + confirmed-leads grid. /projects = all 9 adoptable projects with claim CTAs.

entries.title: Site live at zabalgames.com
entries.description: Vercel deploy connected, DNS propagated, TLS provisioned, deployment protection off. HTTP/2 200. Short URLs working (/spec /todo /snap /kit /brand /llms /raw). cleanUrls enabled (/lead vs /lead.html). Six commits live on first deploy.

entries.title: Workshop leads + JSON-LD SEO
entries.description: Workshop leads now a JSON data file (data/workshop-leads.json) with dynamic render on the homepage. Adding a lead = edit JSON, page re-renders. JSON-LD Event + WebSite schema added to homepage <head> for rich previews + indexing.

entries.title: OG share card SVG + sitemap + Confirmed Workshop Leads section
entries.description: 1200x630 branded SVG share card (assets/og-card.svg). robots.txt + sitemap.xml. Confirmed Workshop Leads subsection under #workshops with Tyler / Magnetiq as 001 + an 'Your slot here' open card.

entries.title: Custom Snap endpoint - 4 in-cast role buttons + Mini App fallback
entries.description: /api/snap/signup serves the proper @farcaster/snap v2.0 JSON for Snap-aware clients (4 role buttons -> POST -> confirmation Snap with open_url buttons), or fc:miniapp HTML for browsers and older clients. Vary: Accept handles CDN caching. Backend = Formspree stub until Supabase lands.

entries.title: Claude skill + llms.txt - the build prompt at the site root
entries.description: llms.txt is the machine-readable July prompt at zabalgames.com/llms.txt - any AI harness can fetch the full ZAO ecosystem context in one call. Companion Claude skill at .claude/skills/zabal-games/SKILL.md is installable via curl.

entries.title: Repo moved to ZAODEVZ/zabalgames + everything consolidated
entries.description: Initial commit: 19 files. Site, brand context, launch kit, db schema, 9 research docs (630, 646, 654, 695, 701, 714, 719), README, LICENSE, gitignore, farcaster.json stub, icon asset. ZABAL Games is now its own repo + its own domain. BCZ zabalgames.html became a redirect.

entries.title: Tyler call - Magnetiq hosting + Zabal connector + Finals announcement plan
entries.description: Lock-ins from the 2026-05-22 Tyler Stambaugh call (Magnetiq founder): ZABAL Games runs on Magnetiq for the workshop library + entry + submissions; the Zabal connector NFT is the anchor magnet (entry mechanic); the July prompt is an llms.txt; Tyler confirmed as first workshop lead; ZABAL Games + ZAOstock launch as separate posts ~05-24.

entries.title: Canonical state doc 701 - 24 decisions captured
entries.description: Doc 701 consolidates ZABAL Games end-to-end and records 24 decisions from a structured interview. Key shifts: named 8-mentor roster removed (open recruitment), finalist count open, build prompt drops Option A-E tracks, calendar stays month-level (June prep / July build / August Finals).

entries.title: Empire Builder V3 + calendar pivot (yerbearzerker meeting)
entries.description: Meeting with Jordan Oram (yerbearzerker) + Iman + Zaal. The original all-June plan becomes June prep / July build / August Finals. Empire V3 tier stack locked (Basic tokenless vs Ascended). Build-then-airdrop pattern: build leaderboard during Games, export CSV, that IS the airdrop list.

entries.title: ZABAL Games Season 1 spec drafted
entries.description: The original Season 1 working spec + decision log. Format, mentor model, $500 USDC prize, judging (was Respect 1p1v - since updated to WaveWarZ-Base per Doc 720), infra, risks. Drafted by Zaal, iterated through 2026-05-14.
